response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a senior software developer with strong technical skills in multiple languages (including Java) and agile methodologies. However, his current role focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure, with limited recent Java project exposure. His German language skills are at a basic level, which may hinder effective client collaboration in Germany. His diverse background and enthusiasm for innovation are clear strengths.
strengths: Strong technical foundation with experience in Java and object-oriented programming
Proven expertise in agile development and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated ability to work on complex, scalable systems and collaborate with clients
concerns: Limited recent Java project experience (current focus on TypeScript/Node.js)
Basic German language skills, which may impact client communication in Germany
Overqualified for a junior role, which could lead to retention or engagement challenges
